scripts.start: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$port = if ($env:PORT) { $env:PORT } else { 5080 }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; node server.js"
